scope: GSC-only (Google Search Console + keyword master list). Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual and are not auto-generated here.
wins: Core local intent is locked: 'bariatric surgery counseling san antonio' holds #1 (1.0, up from 15.8 a month ago), with 'bariatric counseling san antonio' @2.0 and 'weight loss counseling san antonio' @2.0 both steady in the #2-3 tier.

Four tracked terms posted strong positive deltas on real impressions: 'weight loss counseling' +11.0 to 37.9 (7 imp), 'weight loss counseling or therapy' +5.5 to 4.5 (2 imp), 'bariatric counseling near me' +4.9 to 4.3 (3 imp), and 'weight management therapist san antonio' +1.0 to 3.0.

Page-1 commercial visibility intact on the head terms: 'bariatric counseling' @9.8 with the largest tracked impression base (29 imp), plus 'weight loss therapy' @6.0 and 'bariatric surgery counseling' @6.6.

Top blog assets pull heavy page-1/near-page-1 impressions: the weight-loss-medications (Wegovy/Ozempic/Zepbound) post drew 1,007 impressions @9.8 and the anxiety-and-depression-related-to-weight post 849 impressions @12.7.
Distribution stayed healthy: 1 term at #1, 3 at #2-3, and 8 at #4-10 (12 of 22 ranked terms on or near page 1).
needs_attention: Keyword coverage (a KEYWORD count, not a page count): 22 of 74 tracked keywords show GSC impressions; 52 show none. Most of the staging-targeted tracker URLs are stale pointers to pages that are already live on www, so this is a tracker-hygiene gap, not lost traffic. For reference, the 74 keywords map to 49 distinct target pages, of which 7 still point at staging and 42 at live www.

Visibility softened across the full window: impressions fell from 2,447 (May 7) to 1,687 (Jun 22) and impression-weighted avg position eased from 14.87 to 18.48 -- though the last two weeks are recovering (avg position improved from ~22 in late May toward ~17-18 now).

CTR is near zero: 8 clicks on 1,687 impressions (~0.47%). The biggest page-1 impression generators are converting almost nothing -- the weight-loss-medications post logged 1,007 impressions and 0 clicks.

Specific commercial terms slipped on real impressions: 'san antonio bariatric center' dropped -32.1 to 43.4 (16 imp, the largest slip), 'bariatric surgery counseling' -3.6 to 6.6 (8 imp), 'bariatric counselor' -3.6 to 7.6 (5 imp), and 'eating disorder therapist san antonio' -3.3 to 16.4 (11 imp).
Caveat: many tracked positions rest on only 1-3 impressions, so single-impression positions swing day to day and these deltas are directional only.
priority_actions: Tracker hygiene first: repoint the 7 staging targetUrls in keywords-master.json (san-antonio-bariatric-center, bariatric-counseling-near-me, weight-loss-counseling-or-therapy, eating-disorder-therapist-near-me, what-is-a-bariatric-counselor, what-is-a-weight-loss-counselor, intuitive-eating-mcallen) to their correct live www URLs so GSC can match and coverage reflects reality.

Investigate and defend 'san antonio bariatric center' (-32.1 to 43.4 on 16 impressions) -- the single most-slipped commercial term this run; on-page refresh and internal links to the bariatric service page.

Fix CTR by routing the heavy-impression blog traffic into conversion paths: add clear CTAs and internal links from the weight-loss-medications (1,007 imp) and anxiety-and-depression (849 imp) posts into the matching bariatric / weight-management service pages.
Hold the core local lane: keep defending the #1-#3 San Antonio terms (bariatric surgery counseling #1, bariatric counseling #2, weight loss counseling #2) with fresh on-page signals and reviews.

Add/confirm FAQ schema on the top service and blog pages for rich-result and AI-overview eligibility. If a staging-to-prod publish backlog is suspected, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's own notes -- do not infer it from keyword data.
summary: Core local San Antonio terms are strong (a held #1 plus two #2 positions) and several commercial terms moved up, but sitewide impressions and avg position softened over six weeks and CTR sits near 0.5%. Top priorities: clean up the 7 stale staging tracker URLs, defend the -32.1 slip on 'san antonio bariatric center', and convert high-impression blog traffic into the service pages.
